data.title: BioMarin Announces Board Leadership Transition
data.description: Ian T. Clark has been elected as the Chair of the Board at BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc., replacing Richard A. Meier who is set to retire. This decision was made public on April 21, 2026, by the company based in San Rafael, California. BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BMRN. The appointment of Ian T. Clark is pending his official election at the upcoming...

data.title: WesBanco Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: WesBanco, Inc. reported a 22 basis points increase in net interest margin compared to the previous year. The company, listed on Nasdaq as WSBC, expanded into South Florida, showcasing advanced organic growth. This diversified bank holding company, based in Wheeling, West Virginia, made this announcement on April 21, 2026.
Atlantic American Corporation Receives Nasdaq Notice Regarding Delayed Form 10-K Filing

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Duke Energy/
data.description: Duke Energy lineworkers recently enhanced their abilities at the Carolinas Lineman's regional rodeo. The event took place on 21-Apr-2026 and was organized by Duke Energy to support their staff. The competition aimed to sharpen the skills of lineworkers, promoting reliability in power services. Duke Energy confirmed that adjustments were made to improve the event. This initiative showcased the dedication of lineworkers and emphasized the company's commitment to excellence in the field. The regional rodeo saw participation from a significant number of lineworkers and highlighted the importance of ongoing training in maintaining reliable power supply.

data.title: FHLBank Chicago Announces Q1 2026 Financial Highlights
data.description: In Chicago, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) revealed its preliminary financial results for Q1 2026. President and CEO Michael Ericson highlighted the bank's role as a dependable liquidity source for members amidst market unpredictability. Through disciplined balance sheet management and robust capital levels, the bank successfully handled rising member demand. The financial report remains unaudited and showcases the bank's commitment to supporting its members' financial needs in challenging times.

data.title: Cadre Holdings Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.10 Per Share
data.description: Cadre Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CDRE), a leading company in safety equipment manufacturing for various markets, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share ($0.40 annually). The dividend will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record.

data.title: Boise Cascade Company First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) has announced that they will be conducting a webcast and conference call to address their first quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, at 11 a.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in joining the webcast can access it via the Investor section of their website at www.bc.com/investors and choosing the Event Calendar link. For analysts and investors who want to participate in the Q&A session, registration for the call is required. The archived version of the webcast will also be accessible in the Investors section of Boise Cascade’s website.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. Announces May 2026 Dividend Rate Per Common Share
data.description: In VERO BEACH, Florida on April 21, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. declared the May 2026 cash dividend for its Common Stock. The company, listed as NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC, disclosed this information.

data.title: Amrize Shareholders Approve All Proposals at 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: At its inaugural Annual General Meeting, Amrize (AMRZ) received approval on all agendas from shareholders in Chicago and Zug, Switzerland. Among the decisions was the authorization of a unique, one-time dividend for the year 2025, amounting to $0.44 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on May 4, 2026, to all eligible shareholders. To qualify for this distribution, shareholders must hold the shares by April 23, 2026, the cum-dividend date. On April 24, 2026, the shares will be listed ex-dividend, marking the record date for shareholders.

data.title: Zscaler Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security in the Application Category
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Zscaler, Inc. was awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security in the Application category. Listed on NASDAQ as ZS, Zscaler is known for cloud security services. The award recognizes the success of their Zero Trust Exchange™ platform, which collaborates with Google's AI infrastructure to offer autonomous data protection for users and applications. Zscaler specializes in securing Google workloads, offering DLP for Workspace users, and integrating with Google SecOps and the Vertex AI platform.

data.title: Richmond American Announces Community Grand Opening in Las Vegas
data.description: Caliterra has unveiled three sets of floor plans featuring luxurious designer touches in Las Vegas. The Grand Opening of Caliterra is presented by Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., and is set for April 21, 2026. The paired floor plans can be explored on RichmondAmerican.com/Caliterra, offering a range of elegant options for potential homeowners.

data.title: California American Water Celebrates Earth Day With Water Saving Tips
data.description: As Earth Day approaches on April 22, 2026, California American Water from San Diego emphasizes the significance of safeguarding local water resources. They stress the need for environmental stewardship, strategic infrastructure investment, and community involvement to protect the environment. This initiative is part of a broader effort to promote sustainability and responsible water usage in the region. By raising awareness and taking action, everyone can contribute to preserving the planet for future generations.

data.title: BRIDGE Appoints Morgan Jetto As Executive Vice President, Business Development & Ecosystems
data.description: Experienced industry professional to oversee strategic partnerships as BRIDGE solidifies its role as a reliable partner for audience targeting and curation. In a press release dated April 21, 2026, BRIDGE, the verified people-data platform for advertising and marketing, announced the appointment.

data.title: GCC Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Chihuahua, Mexico on April 21, 2026, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: GCC*), a prominent provider of cement, aggregates, and concrete in the United States and Mexico, revealed its performance data for the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: Revolut aims for $200B valuation in IPO by 2028 as per report, delaying the move for now.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global financial technology company, Revolut, is considering going public with an Initial Public Offering (IPO) valued at $200 billion. However, it is important to note that this potential IPO is not imminent.

data.title: 21shares Announces Staking Distribution Schedule for TDOT and TSUI
data.description: On April 21, 2026, 21Shares, a major issuer of cryptocurrency ETPs, revealed the anticipated distribution dates for staking rewards for the 21shares Polkadot ETF (TDOT) and the 21shares Sui ETF (TSUI). The staking rewards will be distributed as per the table provided. 21Shares is renowned as one of the leading issuers of crypto ETPs globally, and the Trusts' distribution dates for staking rewards were shared by the company.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. First Quarter 2026 Webcast Scheduled for April 23, 2026
data.description: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. stated that it will host a live webcast of its conference call with equity analysts discussing the first quarter of 2026 results on Thursday, April 23, 2026. The company, trading on NYSE under ARR and ARR-PRC, will release its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the market closes.

data.title: Range Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Range Resources Corporation, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RRC, revealed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 in Fort Worth, Texas on April 21st.
